# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create an Istio mesh configuration (meshConfig) that allows outbound traffic to any external service. Set outboundTrafficPolicy mode to ALLOW_ANY so services can call external APIs without ServiceEntry definitions. This provides maximum flexibility for microservices that integrate with various external APIs.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

meshConfig:
  enablePrometheusMerge: true
  accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: ALLOW_ANY
  defaultConfig:
    discoveryAddress: istiod.istio-system.svc:15012
    proxyMetadata:
      ISTIO_META_DNS_CAPTURE: "true"
      ISTIO_META_AUTO_REGISTER_GROUP: "true"
    tracing:
      zipkin:
        address: zipkin.istio-system:9411
  enableAutoMtls: true
  trustDomain: "cluster.local"
  defaultServiceExportTo: ["*"]
  defaultVirtualServiceExportTo: ["*"]
  defaultDestinationRuleExportTo: ["*"]
  rootNamespace: istio-system
